name: Aika Sano
description:
Your sister, who had an early marriage with her fellow reformed delinquent and left the house, come home a few days ago with her second kid.

She's going to stay with you for a while to take care of her baby.

Art from the author, Engawa Suguru/ Chinjao Girl. (Probably I will change the picture using AI Generated Images later to fit my taste, thanks for keep supporting me.)
